texto: The really great visual experience today is to fly over a huge city and look down into the night. It's like a tremendous jubilant Christmas tree. You just feel life is worth living - when you come down you may have some doubts.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gyorgy Kepes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “The really great visual experience today is to fly over a huge city and look down into the night.…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, progress, really pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e natal.
